Subject: Venue details request for AYSO tournament listing

Hi {{recipient_name}},

We’re improving our published AYSO tournament listings and trying to make sure each event has accurate venue details for teams, referees, and families.

Could you please confirm (or provide) the primary venue(s) for:

- Tournament: {{tournament_name}}
- Dates: {{start_date}}–{{end_date}}
- City/State: {{tournament_city}}, {{tournament_state}}
- Website: {{tournament_url}}

If the tournament uses one venue, please reply with:

- Venue name:
- Street address:
- City, State ZIP:
- Notes (parking, gate address, field map link, “multiple locations”, etc.):

If the tournament uses multiple venues, please reply with a list in this format:

1) Venue name — Street, City, State ZIP — Field/Map link (optional)
2) Venue name — Street, City, State ZIP — Field/Map link (optional)

Thank you—once we have the venue details we’ll update the listing so it’s clearer for everyone attending.

Best,
{{sender_name}}
{{sender_title}}
{{sender_email}}
